'''√sh-sh-r''' ('''shashara''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:twttr|twttr]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-sh-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:twttr|twttr]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √sh-sh-r
|-
! Lemma
| shashara
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shasharithi|shasharithi]] || [[word:shashariji|shashariji]] || [[word:shasharishi|shasharishi]] || [[word:shashari|shashari]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:shasharuthuth|shasharuthuth]] || [[word:shasharujuj|shasharujuj]] || [[word:shasharushush|shasharushush]] || [[word:shashar|shashar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:shasharuthu|shasharuthu]] || [[word:shasharuju|shasharuju]] || [[word:shasharushu|shasharushu]] || [[word:shasharu|shasharu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:shasharufuth|shasharufuth]] || [[word:shasharufuj|shasharufuj]] || [[word:shasharufush|shasharufush]] || [[word:shasharuf|shasharuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:shasharethe|shasharethe]] || [[word:shashareje|shashareje]] || [[word:shashareshe|shashareshe]] || [[word:shashare|shashare]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:shasharothoth|shasharothoth]] || [[word:shasharojoj|shasharojoj]] || [[word:shasharoshosh|shasharoshosh]] || [[word:shashar|shashar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:shasharotho|shasharotho]] || [[word:shasharojo|shasharojo]] || [[word:shasharosho|shasharosho]] || [[word:shasharo|shasharo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:shasharofoth|shasharofoth]] || [[word:shasharofoj|shasharofoj]] || [[word:shasharofosh|shasharofosh]] || [[word:shasharof|shasharof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:shasharïf|shasharïf]] || [[word:shasharïf|shasharïf]] || [[word:shasharïf|shasharïf]] || [[word:shasharïf|shasharïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:shasharïfïf|shasharïfïf]] || [[word:shasharïfïf|shasharïfïf]] || [[word:shasharïfïf|shasharïfïf]] || [[word:shasharïfïf|shasharïfïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:shasharïf|shasharïf]] || [[word:shasharïf|shasharïf]] || [[word:shasharïf|shasharïf]] || [[word:shasharïf|shasharïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:shasharïf|shasharïf]] || [[word:shasharïf|shasharïf]] || [[word:shasharïf|shasharïf]] || [[word:shasharïf|shasharïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:shasharæthæ|shasharæthæ]] || [[word:shasharæjæ|shasharæjæ]] || [[word:shasharæshæ|shasharæshæ]] || [[word:shasharæ|shasharæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:shasharathath|shasharathath]] || [[word:shasharajaj|shasharajaj]] || [[word:shasharashash|shasharashash]] || [[word:shashar|shashar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:shasharatha|shasharatha]] || [[word:shasharaja|shasharaja]] || [[word:shasharasha|shasharasha]] || [[word:shashara|shashara]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:shasharafath|shasharafath]] || [[word:shasharafaj|shasharafaj]] || [[word:shasharafash|shasharafash]] || [[word:shasharaf|shasharaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:shasharasha|shasharasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshasharasha|goshasharasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishasharasha|gokishasharasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:shasharnüsha|shasharnüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshasharnknüsha|goshasharnknüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishasharnüsha|gokishasharnüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shasharshësha|shasharshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshasharnkshësha|goshasharnkshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishasharshësha|gokishasharshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasharrosha|shasharrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasharnkrosha|goshasharnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasharrosha|gokishasharrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shasharmusha|shasharmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasharnkmusha|goshasharnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasharmusha|gokishasharmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shasharsherasha|shasharsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshasharnksherasha|goshasharnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishasharsherasha|gokishasharsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:shasharngasha|shasharngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshasharnkngasha|goshasharnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishasharngasha|gokishasharngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:shasharyasha|shasharyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshasharnkyasha|goshasharnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishasharyasha|gokishasharyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shasharyamasha|shasharyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshasharnkyamasha|goshasharnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishasharyamasha|gokishasharyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasharnüshësha|shasharnüshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasharnknüshësha|goshasharnknüshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasharnüshësha|gokishasharnüshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasharnürosha|shasharnürosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasharnknürosha|goshasharnknürosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasharnürosha|gokishasharnürosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasharnümusha|shasharnümusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasharnknümusha|goshasharnknümusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasharnümusha|gokishasharnümusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasharshënüsha|shasharshënüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasharnkshënüsha|goshasharnkshënüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasharshënüsha|gokishasharshënüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasharshërosha|shasharshërosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasharnkshërosha|goshasharnkshërosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasharshërosha|gokishasharshërosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasharshëmusha|shasharshëmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasharnkshëmusha|goshasharnkshëmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasharshëmusha|gokishasharshëmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasharronüsha|shasharronüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasharnkronüsha|goshasharnkronüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasharronüsha|gokishasharronüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasharroshësha|shasharroshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasharnkroshësha|goshasharnkroshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasharroshësha|gokishasharroshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasharromusha|shasharromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasharnkromusha|goshasharnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasharromusha|gokishasharromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasharmunüsha|shasharmunüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasharnkmunüsha|goshasharnkmunüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasharmunüsha|gokishasharmunüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasharmushësha|shasharmushësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasharnkmushësha|goshasharnkmushësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasharmushësha|gokishasharmushësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasharmurosha|shasharmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasharnkmurosha|goshasharnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasharmurosha|gokishasharmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:shashar|shashar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:shæshær|shæshær]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hoshashar|hoshashar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hoshæshær|hoshæshær]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoshashar|hohoshashar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoshæshær|hohoshæshær]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nüshashar|nüshashar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nüshæshær|nüshæshær]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nünüshashar|nünüshashar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nünüshæshær|nünüshæshær]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nïshashar|nïshashar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nïshæshær|nïshæshær]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nïnïshashar|nïnïshashar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nïnïshæshær|nïnïshæshær]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lushashar|lushashar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lushæshær|lushæshær]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulushashar|lulushashar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulushæshær|lulushæshær]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lishashar|lishashar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lishæshær|lishæshær]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilishashar|lilishashar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilishæshær|lilishæshær]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:koshashar|koshashar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:koshæshær|koshæshær]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoshashar|kokoshashar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoshæshær|kokoshæshær]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:keshashar|keshashar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:keshæshær|keshæshær]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekeshashar|kekeshashar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekeshæshær|kekeshæshær]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d414c41}}
